cases.prompt_body: Low cropped clinical macro of a Therac-25 beam-path safeguard rail and blocker slot, frame excludes any front housing label or badge, off-white guide rails and blocker mount clearly readable, the physical interlock that should sit between source and patient is absent, leaving one empty stop position and open path, pale beige paneling, charcoal shadow, technical fluorescent light
